untranslatable_reason: EWO (Elder-ray Oscillator) is not in the allowed indicators list. The signal requires EWO < 0 (5-day below 35-day), trend direction state tracking, and a 'trigger' parameter relative to lowest EWO over n periods, all of which are author-silent or unavailable. Approximated using MACD (similar trend-following oscillator) and EMA cross as closest substitute, but this deviates significantly from the original EWO-based logic.
translation_notes: Signal references EWO (Elder-ray Oscillator) which is not available. Substituted with MACD and EMA-based conditions to capture similar trend-reversal logic: (1) EMA_5 < EMA_35 keeps us in downtrend zone, (2) MACD histogram < 0 confirms downtrend, (3) MACD crosses above signal line triggers entry on upward momentum. However, the specific 'trigger * lowest(EWO, n)' bounce logic cannot be replicated. Parameters 'trigger' and 'n' are author-silent. Exit condition was author-silent; used standard MACD reversal.
